assets.description: Transparent compact heated forge module icon with amber heat and teal signal accents.
assets.intended_use: Production lane icon for forge-line lane status display.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation on chroma key, locally keyed to alpha, cropped, sharpened, and resized to 96x96 PNG.

assets.description: Opaque dark factory dispatch floor title art with three production lanes, queue rails, and teal signal lines.
assets.intended_use: Game title card and arcade thumbnail art.
assets.notes: Generated with Codex built-in image generation, center-cropped to 16:9, contrast/sharpness adjusted, and resized to 800x450 opaque PNG.

procedural_fallbacks.reason: The floor board is generated from CSS rails and stateful lane cards so it can scale with live lane status without stale raster overlays.
Core resource icons are procedural UI glyphs next to live counters because labels, amounts, shortage state, and output pulses must remain deterministic text and data attributes.
Output travel is a stateful CSS token keyed by current job output resource instead of a baked image.
Shortage state is tied to deterministic affordability checks on queue, job, lane, and resource elements.
Overdrive is rendered as heat and speed treatment from lane state, keeping the existing local lane machinery asset truthful.
Jam sparks are procedural because the active fault icon already identifies the fault type and CSS carries the live blocked/recovery state.
Sabotage, freight, and crisis incident markers are state hooks on existing incident cards, avoiding unmanifested one-off raster badges.
The shift summary header uses live produced totals and upgrade-choice state, so CSS treatment is more truthful than static text baked into an image.
The first visible upgrade family is a procedural icon set keyed by upgrade ids and affordability state.

notes: Original Dark Factory Dispatch asset pack generated through the visual-asset-pipeline Codex bridge; final project-consumed PNGs are local under games/dark-factory-dispatch/assets.
